spec_match.rationale: Clean implementation using PerformanceObserver for native soft-navigation events, properly isolated from the simulated fallback.

interactive.rationale: Interactive route navigation dynamically builds a rich SVG-like timeline grid with detailed duration tooltips.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the Navigation Timeline description.

edge_cases.rationale: Flawless isolation of simulated paths and comprehensive feature detection.

references.rationale: Violates repository hard rule: does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5144837209194496.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful visual presentation of the timeline matching styling guidelines.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus link (hard rule violation)
openQuestions.detail: The page does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5144837209194496, which violates the repository hard rule that every concept page must include a ChromeStatus link.
